prompt:
Goal: Create a clean landing-page hero visual showing three overlapping white SaaS feature cards for a sales intelligence / lead monitoring product, in a premium minimal Figma-style mockup.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, warm off-white background with very soft beige gradient, subtle vignette, realistic soft shadows under cards. Cards are tall rounded rectangles with slight perspective tilt and depth, floating in the center. Use elegant editorial serif typography for large headings and small sans-serif labels.

Layout: Arrange exactly 3 vertical cards, overlapping horizontally. The left card is in front and tilted slightly counterclockwise, the middle card is centered and nearly upright, the right card sits behind and tilted slightly clockwise. Keep generous whitespace and rounded corners.

Card 1, left card — capture sources: At the top left place a small orange circular logo icon with abstract white marks. Near the top center place a pale peach pill label reading “CAPTURA”. Large headline in Portuguese: “12+ fontes escutando seu mercado 24h”. Below it, show exactly 12 small rounded source tiles in a 3-column by 4-row grid, each with an icon and label. The 12 labels are: “Notícias”, “LinkedIn”, “Reddit”, “Google”, “Podcasts”, “X (Twitter)”, “YouTube”, “Trustpilot”, “Blogs”, “Wikipédia”, “Comunidades”, “e mais”. Use recognizable simplified icons: globe, LinkedIn logo, Reddit alien, Google G, podcast glyph, X logo, YouTube play button, green trust star, document/blog icon, W, group/community dots, plus sign.

Card 2, center card — match score: Place a pale green pill label reading “ENTENDE”. Main headline text: “ICP Match 94%”. Center a thick circular donut progress ring in bright orange, almost complete, with pale peach remainder. Inside the ring, display “94%” in large serif type and a tiny subtitle “de compatibilidade”. Below the ring place exactly 3 thin rounded checklist rows with small green check icons and the labels: “Perfil ideal identificado”, “Sinais alinhados”, “Alta intenção detectada”.

Card 3, right card — action scheduling: Place a dark green pill label reading “AGE”. Large headline in Portuguese: “Reunião agendada automaticamente”. Below it, include a compact calendar widget headed “Maio 2025” with weekday labels in Portuguese: “SEG”, “TER”, “QUA”, “QUI”, “SEX”, “SÁB”, “DOM”. Show a monthly grid of dates with the 15 highlighted by an orange circle. Add small left and right chevrons near the calendar header. At the bottom, include a confirmation block with an orange calendar icon and the text “Reunião confirmada”, “15 de maio, 10:00”, and a green dot followed by “Google Meet”.

Visual style: High-end SaaS landing page aesthetic, soft 3D paper cards, off-white surfaces, thin pale gray dividers, muted green and orange accent colors, subtle shadows, crisp vector UI icons, refined typography, realistic but clean product mockup.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 cards, exactly 12 source tiles on the left card, exactly 3 checklist rows on the middle card, and one calendar widget on the right card. Keep all text legible, no people, no extra logos beyond the specified source icons, no watermark, no browser chrome.
